title: should clear FTS selection on stream change and re-resolve for new stream
verifies: switching streams clears the carried-over FTS default selection, then re-resolves the FTS default column for the new stream on the next search

title: should clear FTS default on field reset and re-resolve on next search
verifies: clicking the field-list reset icon clears the auto-picked FTS default column from the table, then running a new search re-resolves it
